changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE config_parameter ( id integer not null, key VARCHAR not null, key_value VARCHAR, create_date TIMESTAMP, write_date TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT config_parameter_p_key PRIMARY KEY (id) );
CREATE SEQUENCE IF NOT EXISTS config_parameter_id_seq INCREMENT 1 START 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 2147483647 CACHE 1 OWNED BY config_parameter.id;
